docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, YI-JEN AS TO DEFENDANT EDREAMS LLC
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-14-2022 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,755.37 FILED BY LEE, YI-JEN AS TO DEFENDANT EDREAMS LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-24-2021 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, YI-JEN AS TO DEFENDANT EDREAMS LLC
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-25-2021, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT EDREAMS LLC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-14-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-14-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF YI-JEN LEE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEE, YI-JEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EDREAMS LLC $1,800.00 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,915.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-24-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO NOV-19-2021 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF YI-JEN LEE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT EDREAMS LLC IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF IS INFORMED THAT THE ADDRESS PROVIDED FOR THE AGENT OF SERVICE FOR DEFENDANT IS INCORRECT. CORRECT ADDRESS INFORMATION THOROUGH THE CALIFORNIA SECRETARY OF STATE'S WEBSITE FOR THE AGENT OF SERVICE, CT CORPORATION SYSTEM, IS PROVIDED TO PLAINTIFF. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO NOV-19-2021 AT 8:30 A.M. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $65) SERVED DEC-03-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT EDREAMS LLC
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF **SEE SIGNATURE/RECD BY LINE** SERVED SEP-28-2021, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT EDREAMS LLC

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-19-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JAN-14-2022 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF YI-JEN LEE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT EDREAMS LLC IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF IS INFORMED THAT THE PROOF OF SERVICE ON THE CERTIFIED MAILING CAME BACK TO THE COURTS WITH NO SIGNATURE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
